title: CP9 Battles in the Tower of Justice: Turning Point
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Franky, Unknown person #3, Usopp, Unknown person #6, Nami as the scene develops across pages 12–15.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Luffy, Franky, Unknown person #3, Usopp, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of cp9 battles in the tower of justice: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: hope!? I'm not happy with it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll do my best!! I'm their "hope"!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Can a regular boat get me there!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I wonder if Robin's there already !!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Cough, Cough...!! What's up with your punches!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You ain't a normal human, are you!?
